## Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-small-decoder/resolve/main/full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│       └── full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

mmm,mmm_trees,realistic anime artstyle,masterpiece,# Block 1: Style & Quality  
masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, ultra detailed, sharp focus,  
semi-realistic, detailed illustration, beautiful detailed face  

# Block 2: Subject & Composition  
[character with short blonde hair and white cape:1.1], [standing on rocky outcrop facing left, back view], [white flowing cape, black leggings, light-colored boots:1.1], [no visible props or accessories], [wide landscape composition with river and rocks], [high-angle camera view looking down slightly], [rocky terrain with moss, small orange flowers, trees, and turquoise river]  

# Block 3: Lighting — absolutely faithful, high weight  
(side lighting from right:1.4), (soft diffused light:1.3), (warm color temperature:1.3),  
(long shadows stretching leftward across rocks and water:1.2), (no rim light / backlight:1.2), (hazy atmosphere with subtle volumetric light:1.2), (high contrast lighting:1.2)  

BREAK  

# Block 4: Color — faithful but not excessive  
(color palette of turquoise, dark gray, moss green, warm beige, orange accents:1.2),  
(highlight color tendency: warm golden tones:1.1), (shadow color tendency: cool blue-gray tones:1.1), (overall tone: slightly desaturated with natural lighting contrast:1.1)
Analyze the image.ライティングは光源が右側で左へ長い影が伸びていて、画面上半分は影で暗く、画面下半分は明るい.　これをSDXLで再現できるプロンプトを考えて

You are an expert SDXL prompt engineer specialized in GhostXL, a semi-realistic anime model.

Observe the input image and generate a prompt optimized for SDXL image-to-image that preserves the lighting and color mood of the original image as faithfully as possible, while formatting it for GhostXL.

Do not infer anything. Use only information that can actually be observed from the image.

## Preservation Priority

1. **Lighting — highest priority, must be fully faithful**
   - Main light direction, e.g. front-left / camera-right / overhead
   - Height and angle, e.g. 30° elevation
   - Light quality, e.g. hard / soft / diffused
   - Color temperature, e.g. warm 3200K / daylight 5500K / cool 7500K
   - Shadow direction and density
   - Presence or absence of rim light / backlight
   - Atmospheric qualities, e.g. volumetric light / fog / dust / haze

2. **Color Palette — high priority, faithful**
   - Convert the main 3–5 colors into tags
   - Color tendency of highlights
   - Color tendency of shadows
   - Overall saturation and tonal range

3. **Subject & Composition — preserve the original image**
   - Character pose
   - Clothing colors
   - Props and accessories
   - Composition
   - Camera angle

4. **Style — only format for GhostXL**
   - Do not apply a strong transformation.
   - Only guide the image toward GhostXL’s natural semi-realistic illustration style.

## Output Format

Output the following sections separated by BREAK.
Do not include explanations or introductions.

# Block 1: Style & Quality
masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, ultra detailed, sharp focus,
semi-realistic, detailed illustration, beautiful detailed face

# Block 2: Subject & Composition
[subject tag:1.1], [pose], [clothing and color:1.1], [props/accessories], [composition tag], [camera angle], [background elements]

# Block 3: Lighting — absolutely faithful, high weight
([main light direction]:1.4), ([light quality]:1.3), ([color temperature tag]:1.3),
([shadow description]:1.2), ([rim light / backlight]:1.2), ([atmosphere]:1.2),
([overall contrast]:1.2)

BREAK

# Block 4: Color — faithful but not excessive
(color palette of [color 1] [color 2] [color 3]:1.2),
([highlight color tendency]:1.1), ([shadow color tendency]:1.1),
([overall tone]:1.1)

## Usable Tag Examples

【Light Direction】
front lighting, side lighting (left/right), back lighting, top-down lighting,
three-quarter lighting, rim lighting, rembrandt lighting, split lighting

【Light Quality / Time of Day】
hard sunlight, soft diffused light, overcast lighting, golden hour, blue hour,
indoor warm lighting, studio lighting, window light, candlelight

【Color Temperature Tags】
warm color temperature, cool color temperature, neutral white,
amber tones, cool blue tones, magic hour warmth

【Shadows / Contrast】
high contrast lighting, low contrast lighting, chiaroscuro,
deep shadows, soft shadows, long shadows

【Atmosphere】
volumetric lighting, god rays, light shaft, hazy atmosphere,
foggy, dusty air, particles in light

【Color Palette Examples】
muted earth tones, vibrant saturated colors, pastel palette,
monochromatic blue, complementary orange and teal, autumn warm palette

## Rules

- Do not describe elements that are not present in the original image.
- Lighting tags must always be strongly weighted at 1.3 or higher.
- Limit the color palette to 3–5 colors. Too many colors may confuse CLIP.
- Do not use extreme style words such as “anime” or “cartoon.” GhostXL will naturally handle the stylization.
- Do not use photorealistic tags such as “photo,” “realistic,” or “3d.”

(low quality, worst quality:1.4),cgi,text,signature,watermark,huge tree.stream,   low quality, normal quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts,
  watermark, signature, text, ugly, deformed,
  flat lighting, washed out, overexposed, underexposed,
  wrong colors, color shift,
  3d render, photograph, photo realistic

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
GSN_style, ghostxl,
 delicate and refined rendering, precise visual observation, finely controlled detail, elegant surface treatment, subtle and nuanced brushwork, clean form definition, graceful tonal transitions, beautiful natural lighting, carefully shaped light and shadow, painterly contrast, rich midtone separation, gentle highlight control, soft atmospheric depth, balanced color relationships, cohesive visual harmony, tasteful texture treatment, polished image quality
Analyze this image.ライティング入力画像を尊重するようなプロンプトを書いてください。

You are a strict visual observer and Flux2 Klein image-to-image prompt engineer.

Analyze the input natural background image and create a Flux2 Klein prompt that preserves the original exposure, composition, terrain, and vegetation.
Do not beautify, cinematicize, brighten, warm up, or reinterpret the image.
Describe only visible facts from the image.

The highest priority is not style quality, but preserving the original composition and exposure.

## Critical Lighting Preservation

Before writing the final prompt, identify the following precisely:

1. Sun visibility:

* Is the sun disk visible, hidden, or outside the frame?
* Do not invent a visible sun if it is not visible.

2. Key light direction:

* Use screen-space direction: upper-left, upper-right, background-left, background-right, etc.
* Also describe whether the light is front light, side light, backlight, or rim light.

3. Light height and spread:

* Low-angle, mid-angle, or high-angle.
* Narrow shafts, broad glow, dappled patches, or diffuse ambient light.

4. Light color:

* Use precise color language: pale cool white, neutral daylight, muted greenish skylight, warm golden, amber, etc.
* Do not call the light warm or golden unless the image clearly shows warm/golden light.

5. Exposure lock:

* Describe whether the whole image is dark, medium, or bright.
* Describe whether the foreground is dark shadow, midtone, or brightly lit.
* Preserve the source exposure balance.

6. Atmospheric structure:

* Mist, fog, haze, dust, pollen, volumetric shafts.
* Density and screen position.
* Whether the light beams are subtle, moderate, or strong.

7. Lighting anti-drift notes:

* State what must remain unchanged in positive language.
* Example: "keep the sun hidden behind trees", "keep the foreground in deep shadow", "keep the light pale and cool", "keep the beams narrow and partially blocked by trunks".

## Vegetation and Terrain

Describe only visible forms:

* moss carpets, moss-covered rocks, low grass, ferns, vines, hanging moss, bushes
* tree trunks, bark texture, fallen logs, roots, branches
* rocks, soil, leaf litter, pine needles, pebbles, exposed ground
* screen positions: foreground-left, center, midground-right, background, etc.

Avoid scientific plant names unless obvious. Use visual descriptions.

## Composition

Describe:

* camera height
* foreground / midground / background layout
* major masses and visual path
* horizon / vanishing depth if visible

## Output exactly two sections.

### Section 1: Lighting Lock

lighting_lock:
sun_visibility:
key_light_direction:
light_angle:
light_type:
light_color:
light_spread:
overall_exposure:
foreground_exposure:
shadow_direction:
shadow_density:
shadow_edge:
atmosphere:
volumetric_light:
must_preserve:
-
-
-

### Section 2: Flux2 Klein Prompt

Write one English prompt, 80–120 words.

Rules:

* Put lighting preservation before style description.
* Use "preserve" and "keep" frequently.
* Include sun visibility, exposure, foreground darkness, light direction, light color, shadow density, and atmosphere.
* Do not use quality tags such as masterpiece, best quality, 8k, highly detailed.
* Do not use weighted tags like (word:1.2).
* Do not use negative prompt syntax.
* Avoid words that tend to brighten the image unless visible: golden, glowing, radiant, magical, vibrant, sun-drenched.
* If the source image is dark or muted, explicitly say "muted exposure" and "deep foreground shadows".
* If the source has hidden sunbeams, say "hidden sun filtered through trees", not "bright sun".

GSN_style,ghostxl,   Replace the input image in Figure 2 with the art style of the input image in Figure 1,### Section 1: Lighting Lock

lighting_lock:
sun_visibility: hidden behind upper-right canopy, not visible in frame  
key_light_direction: upper-right, side light with slight front component on midground rocks and character  
light_angle: high-angle, slightly oblique  
light_type: direct sunlight filtered through tree canopy, creating dappled patches and sharp shadows  
light_color: warm golden-white, with subtle yellow-orange tint on sunlit surfaces  
light_spread: narrow shafts of light breaking through trees, mixed with broad ambient fill in shaded areas  
overall_exposure: medium-bright overall, with strong contrast between lit and shadowed zones  
foreground_exposure: midtone to dark in shadowed rock areas; bright highlights on sunlit moss and water reflections  
shadow_direction: lower-left (cast from upper-right light source)  
shadow_density: dense in foreground rocks and under overhangs, softening toward midground  
shadow_edge: sharp edges where direct light meets shade, softer transitions in diffuse areas  
atmosphere: clear air with no visible mist or haze; slight atmospheric scattering near water surface  
volumetric_light: subtle, faint beams visible through tree gaps, not prominent  
must_preserve:
- keep the sun hidden behind upper-right canopy
- preserve warm golden-white light on midground rocks and character
- maintain deep shadows in foreground rock crevices and under overhangs
- keep water surface reflecting dappled sunlight with cool blue-green tone
- retain narrow shafts of light breaking through trees, not broad glow

### Section 2: Flux2 Klein Prompt

Preserve the hidden sun behind upper-right canopy, keeping warm golden-white light on midground rocks and character. Maintain medium-bright exposure with deep shadows in foreground rock crevices and under overhangs. Keep shadow direction lower-left with sharp edges where direct light meets shade. Preserve narrow shafts of filtered sunlight breaking through trees, not broad glow. Keep water surface cool blue-green with dappled reflections. Retain moss-covered rocks in foreground-left and midground-right, scattered orange flowers on grassy patches, and exposed gray-brown rock formations throughout. Camera height is slightly elevated, showing river winding between rocky outcrops. Composition features foreground rocks leading to midground character standing on a mossy ledge, with background cliffs and sparse trees. Keep atmosphere clear with no haze or mist.

You are an expert SDXL prompt engineer specializing in style transfer.
  入力画像を観察し、SDXL image-to-image用のタグベースプロンプトを生成してください。

  ## タスクの本質
  入力画像から以下を「保持」し、「スタイルだけ」を置き換える:

  【保持する要素】(元画像に忠実)
  - Composition / camera angle / subject pose
  - Lighting (方向・色温度・コントラスト・影の方向まで忠実に)
  - Atmosphere / time of day / weather
  - Subject identity (植物、)

  【変換する要素】(user_promptで指示されたスタイルに置換)
  - Art medium / style (photoreal → anime, oil painting, watercolor 等)
  - Rendering quality / texture treatment

  ## 出力フォーマット

  以下の3ブロックを **BREAK** 区切りで出力。それ以外の文章・前置きは一切不要。

  # Block 1: Style & Quality (変換ターゲット)
  (target_style_tags:1.2), masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, ultra detailed

 

  # Block 2: Subject & Composition (元画像から忠実に)
  [被写体タグをカンマ区切りで], [構図タグ], [カメラアングルタグ], [服装・小物タグ]

 

  # Block 3: Lighting & Atmosphere (最重要・元画像に完全忠実)
  [lighting方向タグ:1.3], [光源タイプ], [色温度を示すタグ], [影の硬軟], [コントラスト], [大気感タグ], [時間帯]

  ## タグ記述ルール
  - カンマ区切り、英語タグ
  - **重要な要素は (tag:1.2)〜(tag:1.4)** で強調
  - **絶対外せないもの (特にライティング) は (tag:1.3) 以上**
  - スタイルタグは Block 1 の冒頭で強く効かせる
  - 「写実性タグ」と「変換先スタイルタグ」を同時に書かない (矛盾する)
    例: anime style に変換するなら photoreal, realistic は書かない
  - ライティング用の頻出タグ例:
      rim lighting, backlit, side lighting, top-down lighting,
      golden hour, blue hour, overcast, harsh sunlight, soft diffused light,
      high contrast lighting, low key lighting, chiaroscuro,
      volumetric lighting, god rays, ambient occlusion,
      warm color temperature, cool color temperature
  - 構図タグ例:
      wide shot, medium shot, close-up, low angle, high angle, eye level,
      rule of thirds, centered composition, depth of field
